expected_condition: Sector-level lag feature table must exist.
TP/QP future target columns must exist.
Unexpected target-like columns should not appear as inputs.
Numeric temporal feature/target values must not be missing.
Numeric temporal feature/target values must not be infinite.
Each Phase 7 scenario must have the same number of time rows.
Temporal offered traffic must vary across time.
Sector-level next-step target columns must exist.
Sector-level next_* target columns must not be input features.
site_id and sector_id must be metadata only unless explicitly used later.
Sector-level lag input candidates must not contain missing values.
Sector-level lag input candidates must not contain infinite values.
Time ordering must be valid within each scenario-sector group.
